items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse Bucket Bag. Features a ruffled design with key details like the signature knot on the side. The Bucket bag introduces a new size for daily use while retaining the series' graceful style. Stylish and versatile, it can be worn with the donut chain strap or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable leather strap* Removable donut chain charm* Anagram embossed pebbled leather* Discreet magnetic closure* Suede lining, gold or silver foil stamping*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA new mini COBBLE hobo bag. This season's mini Cobble series brings a new handbag style. The bag body resembles a 'hobo' shape, bringing good luck for the whole autumn and winter! This hobo bag is made of three pieces of padding, with a seamless body and no lining, showcasing quiet strength. The bag is carefully designed to create a three-dimensional feel. The connection points and edges are finished with leather strips for a minimalist look. The bag has no separate lining, allowing you to appreciate the lamb leather inside and out, which is beautiful both inside and out. The top handle is made of a leather-wrapped rope, quite sturdy. The detachable shoulder strap is fixed with a leather ring on the bag. Can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or crossbody. Super easy to match!

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta 24SS Woven Zip Crossbody Bag. A crossbody bag that doubles as a makeup pouch, featuring exquisite weaving and a compact body. It is an essential accessory for the upcoming summer. The double zipper offers better protection, and the large capacity makes it a must-have.
